lines: Kephas keeps pass copies under a flat stone and the originals inside his coat.
"North road paper has more than one way to fail. Better to know which failure you bought."

choices.label: Ask what the north markers require
Leave the pass copies under stone

lines: "Paper proves a named bearer under a current seal. The answering code must come from a living wall."
"Hallowfen has not answered, so the chain stays shut even for good paper."

choices.label: Ask whether a Censure writ is enough
Leave the pass copies under stone

lines: "Enough to reach the chain, but not enough to make a silent checkpoint answer."
"A writ proves someone sent you; it cannot prove anyone waits ahead."

choices.label: Leave the pass copies under stone
